case_title: KELLER GU VS. NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GU, KELLER AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GU, KELLER AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GU, KELLER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $0. PLAINTIFF HAS NO BASIS TO ASSERT THAT THE DAMAGE TO THE PROPERTY OCCURRED AFTER HE PURCHASED THE INSURANCE POLICY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: MAILING ADDRESS ADDED SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GU, KELLER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KELLER GU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATIONWIDE GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
